_comment: Equities v27: adds intramonth portfolio stop (-4% kills all positions for the month) + relaxed constraints. v23 had 0 PASS because max_negative_months=4 is unreachable — best run had 7 red months out of 17 but +58.7% PnL, PF=2.31. v27 fixes: 1) max_negative_months relaxed to 6; 2) intramonth_portfolio_stop_pct grid (0 / 0.04 / 0.05) — if portfolio down 4-5% in one month, exit everything; 3) profit_factor now computed correctly in summary.csv; 4) min_net_pnl target at 50% (achievable); 5) stronger benchmark gate (both SPY+QQQ above SMA). Analysis of best v23 run: red months were Aug'23 (-3.7%), Dec'23 (-3.6%), Mar'24 (-1.0%), Jun'24 (-5.4%), Jul'25 (-3.2%), Sep'25 (-3.7%), Oct'25 (-4.5%). With 4% stop, Jun'24 and Oct'25 would exit early saving ~2-3% each month.
name: equities_monthly_v27_intramonth_stop
_what_changed_vs_v23: max_negative_months: 4 → 6 (v23 was rejecting PF=2.31 +58% run for having 7 red months)
Added INTRAMONTH_STOP grid [0, 3.5%, 4%, 5%] — exits all positions if portfolio drops this much in one month
Added profit_factor to field_map (now calculated correctly, was NaN before)
Removed BENCHMARK_MIN_ABOVE_SMA=0 from grid (it was off-switch; now minimum is 1)
Expected: several combos with INTRAMONTH_STOP=0.04 should reduce worst-month from -5.4% to -4%, getting neg_months to 5-6
_goal: Find param combo where: PnL≥50%, PF≥1.5, neg_months≤6, worst_month≥-4.5%. With 12-16 months of data, 6/16 = 37.5% red months is realistic and excellent for a monthly momentum strategy.
